issues.description: Missing duration 'DuringYourTurn' for '[Your Turn]' text. Must include duration property.

Condition type 'TurnCount' is incorrect. Should be a Life check condition (no standard condition exists for '2 or less Life cards' - this requires custom logic or clarification of intended condition type).
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and Vegapunk condition does not match card text. This appears to be incorrectly added and should be removed.
